chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P.No.D-4273 of 2023 Date Order with signature of Judge ________________________________________________________ 1. For order on CMA No. 2502/2024 2. For order on office objection 3. For hearing of Misc. No.19673/2023 4. For hearing of main case 09.09.2025 Malik Altaf Hussain advocate for the petitioner Mr. Ali Safdar Deepar AAG -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. Learned counsel for the petitioner, under instructions, does not press the instant petition, it is accordingly dismissed as not pressed along with listed/pending applications. HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE Wasim PS
